title: Invisible Users: Youth in the Internet Cafés of Urban Ghana
search_query: Invisible Users: Youth in the Internet Cafés of Urban Ghana
notes: An account of how young people in Ghana's capital city adopt and adapt digital technology in the margins of the global economy. The urban youth frequenting the Internet cafes of Accra, Ghana, who are decidedly not members of their country's elite, use the Internet largely as a wa...
